# Scale & Cut 3D

> Scale & Cut 3D is paid Windows and macOS desktop software that automatically turns oversized 3D models into cut, connected, plated 3MF projects for printers with smaller build volumes.

Official website: https://scaleandcut3d.com/
Price: $10 USD one-time purchase
Purchase: https://caneprints.lemonsqueezy.com/checkout/buy/68783033-7123-44ac-8ecc-c4909757244d
Support: https://scaleandcut3d.com/support.html
Getting started: https://scaleandcut3d.com/get-started.html
Privacy: https://scaleandcut3d.com/privacy.html

## What the application does

- Scales a 3D model to a target height, width, depth, longest side, or scale factor.
- Cuts oversized geometry into pieces sized for one or more selected printer beds.
- Supports mixed-bed routing: cuts are planned around the largest selected build volume, then each finished piece is assigned to the smallest selected printer it fits.
- Pieces that only fit a larger selected bed remain assigned to that printer. Routing currently prioritizes physical fit rather than equal workload balancing.
- Supports a custom printer build volume.
- Adds optional press-fit or glue-fit alignment connectors.
- Adds optional matching assembly codes to joined faces.
- Can hollow a model and reduce tiny cut pieces before export.
- Shows a combined exploded preview after cutting.
- Automatically orients and arranges pieces across print plates.
- Creates fully plated 3MF projects for OrcaSlicer or Bambu Studio.
- QIDI Studio has been verified to preserve generated plate layouts after selecting appropriate QIDI profiles.

## Supported files and systems

- Input formats: STL, OBJ, 3MF, PLY, OFF.
- Windows: Windows 10 or newer on x64 hardware.
- Mac: macOS 12 or newer on Apple silicon.
- Full plated-project support: OrcaSlicer, Bambu Studio, and Orca-based slicers such as QIDI Studio and ElegooSlicer.
- Users must select printer, material, and process profiles appropriate for their machine before slicing.
- Very old Orca-based releases may need updating to read projects created by newer Bambu/Orca project formats.
- Geometry-only import: PrusaSlicer; Cura may also import geometry. These do not preserve the automatic plate organization.
- A supported slicer must be installed separately.

## Licensing

- One purchase includes Windows and Mac downloads.
- One license permits activation on up to two computers.
- Activation is handled by Lemon Squeezy.
- The app can operate offline for up to seven days between successful license checks.

## Important limitations

- Scale & Cut 3D is not a slicer and does not generate G-code directly.
- Plate generation requires OrcaSlicer or Bambu Studio.
- Automatic mesh repair cannot guarantee recovery of severely damaged source geometry.
